text:
Interesting! The frontend HTTP server is running from `/home/bot4u/Desktop/GEMINI/Mini_project_test` (the root directory), not from the `frontend/` subdirectory. This means when the user visits `http://localhost:8000`, they see a directory listing, not the actual website.

The website files are in `frontend/` subdirectory, so the user needs to visit `http://localhost:8000/frontend/` to see the actual frontend.

But wait - they said they "turned on the backend and frontend". It seems they may have started the frontend HTTP server from the wrong directory. Let me check what the frontend files look like and confirm this.
